meaning: n.逃跑,逃跑者,巨大的胜利,失控的车(或核子反应堆系统)adj.逃亡的,逃走的
examples: A runaway car came hurtling towards us.
The story tells of a runaway slave girl in Louisiana, circa 1850.
When Peter got to his feet, he led back the runaway with Heidi's help.
See page 72 for Michael Freedman's story on the runaway attorney general from New York.
And he does have some support from conservative Republicans who are alarmed at the runaway spending.
